info.title: GIS Data Converter
info.description:
Web-based geospatial data conversion service.

Upload a file, pick a conversion, then poll the task and download the result.

**Core conversions:** GeoJSONâCSV, GeoTIFFâCOG, RasterâGeoJSON, GeoJSONâRaster, Reprojection (EPSG).

**Secondary conversions:** GeoJSONâShapefile, GeoJSONâGeoPackage, GeoJSONâKML/KMZ, Multi-band GeoTIFFâsingle-band COGs, GeoJSONâCOCO JSON.

Ready-to-use sample inputs for every conversion live in the `test cases/` folder of the repository.

post.summary: Upload a file and queue a conversion

202.description: Task accepted and queued for processing.

413.description: Uploaded file exceeds the size limit.

schema.title: Response List Tasks Api Tasks Get

404.description: Task or output file not found.

resolution.title: Resolution
resolution.description: Rasterization resolution in CRS units (GeoJSON -> Raster).

compression.title: Compression
compression.description: GDAL compression codec for raster output (deflate/lzw/zstd/webp/jpeg/none).

blocksize.title: Blocksize
blocksize.description: Internal COG tile block size, a multiple of 16 (GeoTIFF -> COG).

tags.name: upload
tags.description: Upload a geospatial file and start a conversion job.

tags.name: tasks
tags.description: Check conversion task status and fetch result metadata.
